message:
fix(db): reduce WAL contention and prevent 0-byte WAL corruption (issue #62)

Root causes:
1. wal_autocheckpoint 2000→1000: halves WAL growth before checkpoint
2. journal_size_limit 64MB→256MB: prevents WAL truncation racing with readers
3. MVCC retries 5/310ms→8/~4s: outlasts transient checkpoint stalls
4. cleanup_empty_wal_sidecar(): removes crash-orphaned 0-byte WAL files

Also adds wal_checkpoint_passive() for background checkpoint management
and "wal file too small" to the recovery error detection patterns.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
